mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO TBL_MEMBER ( ID, MEMBER_EMAIL, MEMBER_PASSWORD, MEMBER_NAME, MEMBER_PHONE, MEMBER_NICKNAME, MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL ) VALUES ( SEQ_MEMBER.NEXTVAL, #{memberEmail}, #{memberPassword}, #{memberName}, #{memberPhone}, #{memberNickname}, #{memberProfileImageUrl} )
SELECT SEQ_MEMBER.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
mapper.select: SELECT M.ID, M.MEMBER_EMAIL, M.MEMBER_PASSWORD, M.MEMBER_NAME, M.MEMBER_PHONE, M.MEMBER_NICKNAME, M.MEMBER_CREATED_AT, M.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, M.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS MEMBER_PICTURE, M.MEMBER_EMAIL_VERIFIED_AT, M.MEMBER_PHONE_VERIFIED_AT, SM.SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER_ID, SM.SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER, SM.MEMBER_ID FROM TBL_MEMBER M LEFT JOIN TBL_SOCIAL_MEMBER SM ON M.ID = SM.MEMBER_ID WHERE M.ID = #{id} FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

SELECT M.ID, M.MEMBER_EMAIL, M.MEMBER_PASSWORD, M.MEMBER_NAME, M.MEMBER_PHONE, M.MEMBER_NICKNAME, M.MEMBER_CREATED_AT, M.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL, M.MEMBER_PROFILE_IMAGE_URL AS MEMBER_PICTURE, M.MEMBER_EMAIL_VERIFIED_AT, M.MEMBER_PHONE_VERIFIED_AT, SM.SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER_ID, SM.SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER, SM.MEMBER_ID FROM TBL_MEMBER M JOIN TBL_SOCIAL_MEMBER SM ON M.ID = SM.MEMBER_ID WHERE M.MEMBER_EMAIL = #{memberEmail} AND SM.SOCIAL_MEMBER_PROVIDER = #{socialMemberProvider}
